tests.test_name: Playwright - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a single Playwright test fixture and verifies that the analysis produces valid, framework-tagged JSON output with at least one named test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Playwright - PO - single test, core output structure
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'playwright' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'playwright_single_sample.spec.ts', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel is populated; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, declares framework 'playwright', contains 1 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Playwright - PO - test.each expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a data-driven Playwright fixture using test.each and verifies that each table row is expanded into a separate test entry in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Playwright - PO - test.each expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'playwright' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'playwright_datadriven_sample.spec.ts', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, declares framework 'playwright', contains 2 or more tests (one per test.each row), and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Playwright - PO - for...of expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a Playwright fixture using a for...of loop and verifies that each loop iteration is expanded into a separate test entry in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Playwright - PO - for...of expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'playwright' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'playwright_forof_sample.spec.ts', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, declares framework 'playwright', contains 3 or more tests (one per for...of iteration), and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Playwright - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a single Playwright test fixture and verifies that the analysis produces JSON output that includes a populated coverage matrix for the first test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Playwright - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'playwright' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'playwright_single_sample.spec.ts', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, declares framework 'playwright', contains 1 or more tests each with a non-empty test_name, and the first test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a data-driven Playwright fixture using test.each and verifies that all rows collapse into a single test object whose coverage matrix rows match the example count and conform to the Playwright schema.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'playwright' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'playwright_datadriven_sample.spec.ts', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, declares framework 'playwright', contains exactly 1 test with a non-empty test_name, coverage matrix row count matches the test.each examples, and rows conform to the Playwright coverage matrix schema

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a Playwright fixture using a for...of loop and verifies that all iterations collapse into a single test object whose coverage matrix rows match the iteration count and conform to the Playwright schema.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'playwright' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'playwright_forof_sample.spec.ts', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, declares framework 'playwright', contains exactly 1 test with a non-empty test_name, coverage matrix row count matches the for...of iterations, and rows conform to the Playwright coverage matrix schema
